name: City Watch
description: You are the law given form. Whether driven by duty or necessity, you learned how to assert presence and maintain order through force, discipline, and authority.

feats.name: Quick Grab
feats.description: When you are **Engaged** with an enemy who is attempting to **Disengage** or **Dash**, you attempt a **Grapple** action within range of **touch**.

_review: attribute_bonus was "+1 Body" — mapped to brawn; verify Brawn vs Finesse
